title: Examples, Delimiters, Templates, and Structured Output · Retrieval Circuit
summary: Stabilize a classification and extraction prompt across varied inputs. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a tested prompt template with diverse examples after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Choose relevant and diverse examples that cover boundaries without teaching accidental shortcuts.
Include counterexamples and near misses when category boundaries are material.
Separate instructions, context, examples, and variable data with clear headings or provider-appropriate tags.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
